name: Ambiguous: two plausible candidates
description: Two participants — 'Aman S' and 'A Singh' — both partially match candidate 'Aman Singh' and both give answer-style responses. The system should refuse to guess.

metadata.calendarInviteText: Interview for Aman Singh with Priya Mehta. Note: a shadow interviewer may join.

payload.text: Thanks for joining. Can you introduce yourself?
Hi, I am Aman. I worked on a payments reconciliation service last year.
Hello, Aman here as well — I am currently finishing my degree and I built a chat application recently.
Right — tell me about the most recent project on your resume.
My project handled settlement matching and I implemented the retry logic.
On my side, I built the realtime sync layer and my experience is mostly in WebSocket infrastructure.

notes: Both p2 and p3 sit at the same name-match tier against 'Aman Singh' and both sound like candidates.
No candidate email exists to break the tie.
Expected outcome: status stays 'uncertain' — a wrong confident identification would be worse than abstaining.
